response_parsed.reasoning: The call primarily focuses on addressing issues related to a recent outage and the rollout of a new product version. The team discusses critical bugs affecting enterprise customers, plans for load testing to prevent future incidents, and follows up on action items from a post-mortem review. This indicates a strong emphasis on incident response and reliability improvements.
evidence_quotes: we want to spend the bulk of the time on the post-mortem follow-ups from the Detect outage
we had three customers hit errors with the on-demand SOC 2 report generation
we committed to it in the post-mortem document and I don't want it to become one of those things that just... never happens.
